stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP698 file 2.1.
With regard to the take-off chart for the single engine aeroplane determine the take off distance to 50 ft and the take-off speeds. Given:

OAT: 25°C
Pressure Altitude: 4000 ft
Aeroplane Mass: 3000 lbs
Headwind component: 10 kt
Flaps: Position Up
Runway: Paved and Dry

options.a: TOD: 1650 ft, Rotation speed: 68 kt, 50 ft speed: 78 kt
options.b: TOD: 1850 ft, Rotation speed: 70 kt, 50 ft speed: 80 kt
options.c: TOD: 1900 ft, Rotation speed: 68 kt, 50 ft speed: 78 kt
options.d: TOD: 2200 ft, Rotation speed: 70 kt, 50 ft speed: 80 kt
